mapper.sql: l.id, l.student_id, l.college, l.reason, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.status, l.auditor_id, l.audit_opinion, l.audit_time, l.return_time, l.created_at, l.updated_at, s.real_name AS student_name, sp.student_no AS student_no, a.real_name AS auditor_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM leave_applications l JOIN users s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN student_profiles sp ON s.id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN users a ON l.auditor_id = a.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_applications (student_id, college, reason, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{college}, #{reason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_applications SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, audit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND college = #{college} AND status = 'PENDING'
